description: A relay presents an expired, unrevoked certificate for a known relay_id, but the app peer's issuance record shows a newer certificate has since been issued for that same relay_id (this one is superseded, not the most recent) — a credential-theft-shaped signal. Re-enrollment through the hardened expired-certificate path MUST be refused outright, never silently granted.

error.message: presented certificate serial 5c6d7e8f is superseded by 7a1b2c3d for this relay_id
